rulings.Case Title: BONNIE KAY SPINDLER ET AL VS. ALISON WRIGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 21, 2016 line 7. DEFENDANT ALISON WRIGHT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to substantially comply with form provider for by SFRO 37.9A(f)(2). The missing exhibit and the references to two different properties render the Memorandum to be not "in substantially the following form," i.e. the Memorandum fails to describe the "said property" to be withdrawn. Memorandum recorded on December 12, 2012 does not satisfy the Ellis Act and SFRO requirements as to the Ellis Act process initiated in 2015. Plaintiff's sur-reply, included without leave of Court in the supplemental brief, is stricken (2:3-6; 3:3-4:16; 6:22-7:23). = (501/REQ)
